room.caption: [G3-7A] You will love this track, the Peeping Eyes not so much though.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(15) background_hspeed[0]=-1 background_vspeed[0]=0.5 background_blend[0]=make_color_rgb(255,90,90)
if global.gameProgress=1460 global.gameProgress=1470
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh6MainA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(307) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
